channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Boys Volleyball: El Cajon Valley 3, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: EL CAJON (KUSI)- Boys volleyball action on Wednesday evening with El Cajon Valley beating Patrick Henry in three to run their record to 12-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Camilo Villegas and Lucas Glover among those sharing Players Championship lead on wild day
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Camilo Villegas was on the phone the day before The Players Championship trying to sort out his swing with a coach who is in Singapore caddying at a LIV Golf event. He wound up tied for the lead, a peculiar twist in a tournament filled with them.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rory McIlroy mum on video of him taking phone from University of Texas player heckling him
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Rory McIlroy was interested only in his good start to The Players Championship on Thursday than discussing a heckling incident in which he took the phone of a University of Texas player who had heckled him during a practice round.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Right to Play Act aims to lift IHSA restrictions on high school athletes in club sports
item.description: Illinois State Rep. Janet Yang-Rohr has introduced House Bill 3037, the "Right to Play Act," which would eliminate the IHSA rules that restrict student-athletes from playing their sport during the high school season, potentially improving opportunities for college scholarships.
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: Xavier hopes NCAA bubble doesn't burst after tough loss to No. 25 Marquette at Big East tourney
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — If the Xavier Musketeers get left out of the NCAA Tournament, they'll look back at Thursday as a missed opportunity. With a chance to earn a quality win over No.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-NFL star Le'Veon Bell ordered to pay $25M to cousin who alleges he sexually assaulted her: report
item.description: Le'Veon Bell has reportedly been ordered to pay $25 million to a cousin who claimed he sexually assaulted her for about a decade, beginning when she was about 6 years old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Report: Bears signing former Commanders wide receiver in free agency
item.description: The Chicago Bears are signing free agent wide receiver Olamide Zaccheaus, who recorded a career-high 45 receptions for 506 yards and three TD catches with the Washington Commanders in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Sharks’ Gregor discusses future in San Jose, gives scouting report on Ostapchuk
item.description: NHL: Noah Gregor returned to play for the San Jose Sharks on Thursday against the Chicago Blackhawks at SAP Center
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Jones scores 28 as No. 25 Marquette rallies past Xavier 89-87 in Big East quarterfinal
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Kam Jones scored 28 points and No. 25 Marquette rallied past Xavier 89-87 on Thursday in the Big East Tournament quarterfinals. After trailing by 14 early in the second half, the fifth-seeded Golden Eagles (23-9) took the lead for good at 81-80 on Jones' layup with 1:16 remaining.
item.dc:creator: EVERETT MERRILL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: John Feinstein, bestselling author and one of the country's foremost sports writers, dies at 69
item.description: John Feinstein, one of the country’s foremost sports writers and the author of numerous bestselling books, has died unexpectedly, according to his brother, Robert Feinstein.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jordan Spieth shows there's rarely a dull moment with his game at The Players
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Jordan Spieth wouldn't mind a boring day at the office. Those are rare with him, and Thursday at The Players Championship was no exception.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The growth of women's sports is spurring a building boom
item.description: While it might not be the flashiest way to chart the rapid growth of women's professional sports, a building boom is showing that investors are paying attention. There's already a dedicated women's soccer stadium in the National Women's Soccer League and another one is planned.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Selection Sunday WBB preview: Expect No. 1 seeds for UCLA and USC, but the outlook for the West turns murky from there
item.description: The seeds are likely to be low and the outlook bleak for most teams in the western third of the country.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Metcalfe, The Mercury News

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays withdraw from planned $1.3 billion ballpark in St. Petersburg, citing storms, delays
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Rays withdrew Thursday from a $1.3 billion project to construct a new ballpark adjacent to Tropicana Field, citing a hurricane and delays that likely drove up the proposal's cost.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brignone closes gap on super-G leader Gut-Behrami in race won by Germany's Aicher
item.description: LA THUILE, Italy (AP) — Federica Brignone closed the gap to leader Lara Gut-Behrami in the World Cup super-G standings to 45 points in a race on a shortened course won by German prodigy Emma Aicher on Thursday. Earning her second career win, Aicher edged Sofia Goggia by 0.06 seconds.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL players score a shot at Hollywood through hands-on training sessions with filmmaker Deon Taylor
item.description: SANTA MONICA, Calif. (AP) — Isaac Ukwu's sights were solely set on just playing in the NFL — until two season-ending knee injuries in college served as a harsh reality of football's fragility. The setbacks reshaped Ukwu's perspective, showing him that football was part of him, but not all of him.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Virginia track athlete facing assault charge after baton strike she said was accidental
item.description: Alaila Everett said it was an accident but court records show she is now facing a potential assault and battery charge.
item.dc:creator: Kenzie Finch, NewsNation

item.title: Tampa Bay Lightning to be featured in animated game later this month
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning will air a real-time, animated broadcast for the team's game against the New York Islanders later this month.
item.dc:creator: Katlyn Fernandez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: Bears sign veteran DT Grady Jarrett to 3-year deal
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — In what's been quite a big day for the Bears' brass, they have now reportedly added veteran defensive tackle Grady Jarrett.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Cavaliers rely on scoring balance to beat Bucks 112-100 for 14th consecutive victory
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Max Strus had 17 points to lead a balanced scoring attack as the NBA-leading Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Milwaukee Bucks 112-100 on Sunday night for their 14th consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims to keep winning as San Diego FC visits for the first time
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns to action at America First Field on Saturday night, facing MLS expansion side San Diego FC for the first time. Coming off a commanding 2-0 win over Seattle last weekend, RSL looks to build momentum and keep their shutout streak alive in front of their raucous home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Trump will lead task force preparing for 2026 World Cup
item.description: President Donald Trump has created a task force to prepare for the 2026 World Cup, which will bring the globe's premier soccer tournament to North America at a time when his on-again, off-again tariffs have ratcheted up tensions across the continent.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN J. COOPER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kessler pulls down 25 rebounds in Jazz loss at Toronto
item.description: TORONTO (ABC4 Sports) - Walker Kessler set a career high with 25 rebounds, to go along with a team-high 18 points and a career-high eight blocks, but it wasn't enough to prevent another loss by the Utah Jazz, who fell at Toronto Friday night, 118-101.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Raiders acquire quarterback Geno Smith from Seahawks for a 3rd-round pick, AP source says
item.description: The Las Vegas Raiders answered their most pressing personnel question of the offseason Friday by acquiring quarterback Geno Smith in a trade with Seattle and reuniting him with his former coach, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5
